purpose: Refresh current online money-path source signals for lane managers without starting browser sessions, accounts, submissions, payments, trades, or public actions.

money_paths.signal: Upwork lists active AI freelance jobs and states AI engineers can earn median hourly rates of $35-$60.
money_paths.agent_company_fit: Good fit for a service-offer lane if the agent company can package AI automation, workflow, and implementation proofs.
money_paths.first_local_proof: Build a local offer matrix from existing lab capabilities: AI automation audit, workflow implementation, prompt/eval safety review, and dashboard/report generation.
money_paths.required_gate_before_external_action: outreach_delivery_gate plus account/terms/payment review before proposals or profile changes.

money_paths.signal: Fiverr has a dedicated AI services surface including AI apps, AI agents, automation, data/model training, and consulting categories.
money_paths.agent_company_fit: Good fit for packaging repeatable productized services later; marketplace posting is gated.
money_paths.first_local_proof: Create draft gig/service bundles and compare them to existing Agent Skill Starter Kit assets.
money_paths.required_gate_before_external_action: marketplace account, legal/payment/tax, public listing, and reputation review gates.

money_paths.signal: Upwork's 2026 in-demand skills release says demand for top AI-enabled skills more than doubled year over year.
money_paths.agent_company_fit: Supports prioritizing AI automation/productized service lanes over generic low-complexity freelance work.
money_paths.first_local_proof: Score current lab assets against high-demand AI-enabled skill categories and identify one proofable offer.
money_paths.required_gate_before_external_action: No outreach or proposal without human-approved offer, account route, and anti-spam review.

money_paths.signal: Fiverr's June 2026 Business Trends Index centers AI automation, video content, Shopify execution, and social media marketing demand.
money_paths.agent_company_fit: Useful for offer and content positioning; not proof of direct income by itself.
money_paths.first_local_proof: Draft a no-post content and offer calendar for AI automation and Shopify-adjacent local proof assets.
money_paths.required_gate_before_external_action: public_action_execution and outreach_delivery gates before posting, DMs, or listing copy.

money_paths.signal: ARC Prize 2026 advertises $2M in prizes across 3 tracks for open-source AGI progress.
money_paths.agent_company_fit: High-upside but hard; best initial agent task is local benchmark/harness work, not live submission.
money_paths.first_local_proof: Extend existing ARC toy harness into a local baseline/evaluation packet for ARC-AGI-2/3 style tasks.
money_paths.required_gate_before_external_action: competition rules, account registration, team/IP/license, and submission gates.

money_paths.signal: ARC-AGI-3 lists $850K total, including a $700K grand prize and guaranteed top-score/milestone prizes.
money_paths.agent_company_fit: Good for a dedicated research agent, but expected time-to-cash is long and uncertainty is high.
money_paths.first_local_proof: Write an ARC-AGI-3 eligibility/rules gate packet and baseline architecture sketch from public docs only.
money_paths.required_gate_before_external_action: competition account, rules acceptance, compute budget, and submission approval.

money_paths.signal: Kaggle exposes a money-prize competition filter with active AI competitions such as ARC Prize 2026.
money_paths.agent_company_fit: Reusable source for competition scouts; live participation requires account/rules gates.
money_paths.first_local_proof: Build a local competition scout worksheet from public listings: prize, deadline, rules gate, dataset gate, baseline feasibility.
money_paths.required_gate_before_external_action: account registration, rules, data license, team, compute cost, and submission gates.

money_paths.signal: Comet Opik docs direct contributors to an official Algora bounty board and require reading CLA/contribution guidance.
money_paths.agent_company_fit: Good fit for local code-reading and duplicate-check agents, but claims/PRs are public-action gated.
money_paths.first_local_proof: Convert one existing Algora fixture into a claim-readiness checklist with duplicate, scope, CLA, and maintainer-signal checks.
money_paths.required_gate_before_external_action: GitHub public action, CLA/legal, account, and bounty claim gates.

money_paths.signal: Opire describes a bounty platform where developers solve open-source issues and earn rewards.
money_paths.agent_company_fit: Good candidate for a fresh-source scout once read-only browser/API access is approved.
money_paths.first_local_proof: Create a local source-spec row and parser fixture plan for Opire-style bounty listings.
money_paths.required_gate_before_external_action: read-only source refresh gate, account review, public claim/PR gate, payout gate.

money_paths.signal: HackerOne's directory is a community-curated resource for identifying security contact/program routes.
money_paths.agent_company_fit: Useful for rules-route discovery; active testing and submissions remain tightly gated.
money_paths.first_local_proof: Pick one existing local vulnerability memo and map its possible program route/readiness without submitting.
money_paths.required_gate_before_external_action: program rules, legal scope, security testing approval, account, and private report submission gates.

money_paths.signal: Bugcrowd describes a comprehensive crowdsourced bug bounty and vulnerability disclosure program list.
money_paths.agent_company_fit: Good for source discovery and rules triage; no testing or submission without approval.
money_paths.first_local_proof: Draft a rules-first triage packet template for Bugcrowd-style program entries.
money_paths.required_gate_before_external_action: scope/rules review, account route, legal/security authorization, and submission gate.

money_paths.signal: Gumroad markets itself around helping creators earn a first dollar online and sell digital products.
money_paths.agent_company_fit: Good low-complexity digital product route after legal/payment/listing gates.
money_paths.first_local_proof: Use existing Agent Skill Starter Kit package manifest to produce a Gumroad-style local listing draft and asset gap check.
money_paths.required_gate_before_external_action: account, payment/tax/legal, public listing, customer-support, and reputation review gates.

money_paths.signal: Lemon Squeezy supports digital products, lead magnets, pay-what-you-want, subscriptions, payments, and tax handling.
money_paths.agent_company_fit: Strong for software/template product route, but onboarding/payment/tax gates are central.
money_paths.first_local_proof: Prepare Lemon Squeezy route decision packet comparing digital download, lead magnet, and license/subscription shapes.

money_paths.signal: PromptBase offers selling prompts or agent skills/SKILL.md files, with 0% fees via direct link and 20% via marketplace, and payouts through Stripe or Zoneless.
money_paths.agent_company_fit: Directly relevant to Codex skill products; current lab already has skill/package artifacts to evaluate.
money_paths.first_local_proof: Create a PromptBase-style eligibility packet for the Agent Skill Starter Kit with allowed content, screenshots, copy, and payout gates.
money_paths.required_gate_before_external_action: account, prompt/skill submission rules, payout/tax/legal, marketplace listing, and public-action gates.

money_paths.signal: Gitcoin Grants is a seasonal funding initiative for early-stage builders using crowdfunding and matching grants.
money_paths.agent_company_fit: Potential funding lane if the agent-company artifacts become a public-good or open-source tooling project.
money_paths.first_local_proof: Draft a no-submit grant-fit memo: public-good framing, eligibility gaps, proof assets, and account/wallet requirements.
money_paths.required_gate_before_external_action: account, wallet, public project page, legal/tax/payment, grant application, and public-action gates.

money_paths.signal: DoraHacks positions itself as an open-source incentive, hackathon, bounty, and grants platform.
money_paths.agent_company_fit: Good for deadline/source scouting; direct participation has high account/wallet/public-submission gates.
money_paths.first_local_proof: Create a DoraHacks scout packet template: prize, deadline, chain/wallet need, team need, code/public-submission need.
money_paths.required_gate_before_external_action: wallet/account, legal/tax/payment, public submission, code deployment, and reputation gates.

money_paths.signal: Kalshi documents public market data endpoints that can be accessed without authentication.
money_paths.agent_company_fit: Good fit for paper-only market data monitors and forecast calibration, not real-money trading.
money_paths.first_local_proof: Build a local no-auth market-data schema and paper-only signal worksheet without orders or account access.
money_paths.required_gate_before_external_action: prediction market data source gate; real-money trading requires eligibility, account, treasury, and kill-switch gates.

money_paths.signal: Polymarket US docs cover fetching market data, placing orders, and redeeming positions through API credentials.
money_paths.agent_company_fit: Potential read-only research source; any credential, order, wallet, or redemption path is blocked.
money_paths.first_local_proof: Write a Polymarket US route gate memo separating public/docs research from credentialed trading functions.
money_paths.required_gate_before_external_action: credentials, account, wallet/payment, eligibility, trading, and regulatory gates.

lane_priority_recommendations.reason: Existing Agent Skill Starter Kit artifacts make digital-product route the most locally proofable without external action.
lane_priority_recommendations.next_local_task: Build marketplace route eligibility packets for PromptBase, Gumroad, and Lemon Squeezy.

lane_priority_recommendations.reason: Existing Algora parser/worksheet artifacts can be hardened locally before any live bounty claim.
lane_priority_recommendations.next_local_task: Create a paid-OSS source router that scores Algora/Opire candidates by freshness, duplicate risk, scope, and claim gate.

lane_priority_recommendations.reason: Upwork/Fiverr signals show demand for AI services, but outreach/profile/proposal actions are gated.
lane_priority_recommendations.next_local_task: Create a no-outreach offer proof matrix from current lab capabilities.

lane_priority_recommendations.reason: ARC Prize has large upside, but time-to-cash and difficulty are high.
lane_priority_recommendations.next_local_task: Extend ARC toy harness into a public-rules eligibility and baseline packet.

lane_priority_recommendations.reason: Kalshi public market data supports paper-only research, while real trading is gated.
lane_priority_recommendations.next_local_task: Create no-auth market-data schema and paper-only signal worksheet.

lane_priority_recommendations.reason: Existing local memos are valuable, but submissions/testing need strict rules and authorization gates.
lane_priority_recommendations.next_local_task: Map one existing vulnerability memo to HackerOne/Bugcrowd program-readiness without testing or submitting.

lane_priority_recommendations.reason: Grant/hackathon routes are possible but account/wallet/public-submission gates are heavy.
lane_priority_recommendations.next_local_task: Create no-submit Gitcoin/DoraHacks eligibility packet templates.

next_action: Build money_path_lane_scout_packet_v1 as report-only packets that convert each refreshed path into a lane manager local proof task, with explicit gates before any account, browser, wallet, payment, proposal, submission, trade, public action, worker start, model/MCP call, or external side effect.
